{{CargoOrgan
|name=Brainworm Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10821
|idx=22
|description=This mimetic creature can mimic the neural structure of the brain, and to some extent, it can even replace a brain to think.
|skill=
|hp=700
|def=109
|atk=148
|rush=90
|gene1=Gene Research Free Speedup +5m
|gene2=Gene Simulation Power Checks -2%
|gene3=In Gene Sims, DMG +3%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
